title: tragacantha khasiana
intro: Tragacantha khasiana, also known as the Himalayan thorny acacia, is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha khasiana include reducing fever, treating diarrhea, and alleviating pain, as well as its potential to prevent the growth of certain cancer cells. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves, bark, and roots are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
